markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review October content performance and align on the November production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Cadence:** The production schedule is now aligned with Donald's review availability (Mon/Tues), with 5 articles in review today and the next batch due before Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Organic Growth:** The blog is now the top organic traffic driver, surpassing the homepage. This growth is validated by a 32% increase in Position 1 Google rankings (to 33 queries).](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Lead Quality:** A high volume of non-qualified leads is a concern. A "Request a Demo" CTA on the blog will be tested to generate higher-intent, blog-attributed leads.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Strategy:** The focus is on bottom-funnel "comparison" content, published on the main alex.com domain to build authority and avoid SEO risks associated with "ghost domains."](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

## Topics

### October Performance & November Cadence

  - [**October Output:** 21 articles published, exceeding the 20-article goal.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**November Cadence:** On track for 20 articles, with 5 pieces in review today.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:** To align with Donald's availability (Mon/Tues), Growth X will deliver content batches before Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

### Organic Growth & SEO

  - [**Traffic:** The blog now drives more organic/referral traffic than the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Context:** This metric isolates Growth X's contribution from the homepage's \~5k total monthly sessions, proving the blog's direct impact.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Google Search Console (GSC) Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Position 1:** 33 queries (+32% MoM).](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Positions 2–10:** 133 queries.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**LLM Traction:** Early signs of content discovery from Claude and ChatGPT (3 pre-users in October).](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Lead Quality & Blog Monetization

  - [**October Conversions:** 120 form starts → 63 completions (\>50% rate).](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Lead Quality Issue:** Donald reported a high volume of non-qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Solution:** Add a "Request a Demo" CTA to the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This will generate blog-attributed leads, allowing for a direct comparison of quality against other channels.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase overall sales-qualified lead volume, even if the site-wide conversion rate drops.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Content Strategy & Domain Authority

  - [**Focus:** Bottom-funnel "comparison" content (e.g., "Recruiting Technology Comparisons").](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [**Goal:** Attract high-intent users actively evaluating solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**Domain Strategy:** Publish comparison content on `alex.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Builds authority on the main domain and avoids SEO risks associated with "ghost domains" (e.g., `airecruitinginsights.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Buyer Psychology:** Recruiters are not marketers; they value direct comparisons. The content will frame Alex as the best solution while acknowledging competitor strengths.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Review the 5 articles in the current batch.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
      - [Share GSC ranking and traffic growth data with the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Deliver the next content batch before Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [Discuss the "Request a Demo" CTA implementation with Megan.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-71cgRpyKvW_GyC_AJXxKyqrs6AJs6?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
